message:
style(core): linter improvements to latency_model — fix dedup, add defensive checks

Fix PiecewiseLinear::new() deduplication to properly keep last point at
each t-value. Add defensive is_empty() checks in eval/trailing_slope.
Make is_empty() actually reflect state rather than always returning false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
